channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Andy Burnham Leads Labour Members’ Preference in Potential Leadership Change
item.description: A recent snap poll conducted by Mail on Sunday indicates that Andy Burnham, the Mayor of Manchester, has emerged as the leading choice among Labour party members to succeed Sir Keir Starmer as Prime M...

item.title: POPCRU rejects plans to reintroduce rank insignia in Correctional Services
item.description: The Police and Prisons Civil Rights Union (POPCRU) has firmly opposed the Department of Correctional Services’ plans to reintroduce rank insignia for senior management. The announcement came after Min...

item.title: Labor retains Stafford seat in closely contested by-election
item.description: Labor has narrowly held onto the Stafford seat in a pivotal Queensland state by-election, despite facing a significant swing towards the LNP. Labor candidate Luke Richmond leads with 51.2 per cent of ...

item.title: Sofia Vergara attends Las Vegas party following divorce
item.description: Sofia Vergara, the 53-year-old actress formerly of 'Modern Family', was spotted at the opening of Omnia Day Club in Caesars Palace, Las Vegas, socialising with a number of young male attendees. The ev...

item.title: Ramaphosa plans legal challenge to pause Phala Phala impeachment process
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa is reportedly preparing to interdict the ongoing Phala Phala impeachment proceedings against him. This legal move aims to temporarily halt parliamentary action while he seeks...

item.title: Key Political Partnerships That Shaped Modern India
item.description: In this article, Ramachandra Guha examines seven crucial political duopolies in independent India, analysing their impact on the nation’s development. The first, between Jawaharlal Nehru and Vallabhbh...

item.title: US and Nigerian Forces Successfully Conduct Joint Operation to Eliminate Senior ISIS Commander
item.description: Na big news wey dey show say American and Nigerian forces don collaborate correct-correct to take down Abu-Bilal al-Minuki, one of the top ISIS commanders. President Donald Trump talk on top Truth Soc...

item.title: Governor Approves Expansion of Khyber Pakhtunkhwa Cabinet with 18 New Members
item.description: PESHAWAR: Khyber Pakhtunkhwa’s provincial government has recently expanded its cabinet after the governor, Faisal Karim Kundi, approved the summary sent by Chief Minister Sohail Afridi’s office. The e...

item.title: Canberra sees strong property sales as downsizers target $1 million homes
item.description: Canberra's property market saw a busy weekend, with downsizers actively purchasing homes, particularly those priced around the $1 million mark. In Gordon, Momentum Property's Michael Martin sold a fou...

item.title: Trump-Xi Summit: Limited Gains but Strategic Caution Prevails
item.description: The recent summit between US President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping in Beijing was not expected to deliver any major breakthroughs, yet it was significant in maintaining dialogue and ...

item.title: White House organizes large prayer gathering to highlight US Christian heritage
item.description: The White House recently hosted a mass prayer event with the aim of emphasizing the historical Christian roots of the United States. The gathering drew attention for its explicit connection to Christi...

item.title: Rousey and Carano Return to the Ring After Long Absences in High-Profile MMA Event
item.description: Tonight marks a historic return to mixed martial arts as Ronda Rousey and Gina Carano step out of retirement for the first time in a decade and more, respectively. Rousey, the former UFC champion, has...

item.title: SACP to contest elections independently, signalling shift in alliance politics
item.description: The South African Communist Party (SACP) has announced it will contest the 2026 local government elections independently, signalling a significant shift away from the long-standing tripartite alliance...

item.title: Husband Leaves Family Abruptly After 12 Years of Marriage
item.description: In a recent column by Carolyn Hax, a woman writes about her husband, Ty, who suddenly decided to end their 12-year marriage after a 16-year relationship. According to the letter writer, Ty claimed he ...

item.title: Targeted killings of a woman police officer and a Brahvi poet in Balochistan
item.description: In a tragic series of events on Saturday in Balochistan, a woman police constable and a Brahvi-language poet were brutally killed in separate targeted attacks. Constable Shakeela, while travelling on ...

item.title: Isa: A Privacy-Focused Desk Device to Improve Posture and Workplace Habits
item.description: Working from home can be challenging for maintaining proper posture and staying active. Many apps offer reminders, but they can be easily ignored. Isa, a desk device from German startup Deep Care, add...

item.title: Marina Summers reflects on learning from past mistakes and embracing her journey
item.description: Marina Summers, a well-known Filipino entertainer and LGBTQIA advocate, openly shared her reflections on her past experiences, emphasizing the value of embracing mistakes as part of personal growth. I...

item.title: Russian Couple Sentenced for Prolonged Abuse Leading to Toddler's Death
item.description: A Russian couple, Ekaterina O., 29, and Ilya A., 31, have been sentenced to 20 years in prison for the prolonged abuse and murder of their two-year-old daughter, Sonya. Over five months, the pair conf...

item.title: FIR lodged against Abhishek Banerjee over speeches allegedly inciting public unrest
item.description: The West Bengal Police have filed a First Information Report (FIR) against Trinamool Congress MP Abhishek Banerjee for allegedly making provocative speeches during the Assembly election campaign. The ...

item.title: Joe Jackson Delights Toronto Audience with a Mix of Classics and New Songs
item.description: On Thursday night at Toronto's Danforth Music Hall, veteran musician Joe Jackson, 71, performed a sold-out show as part of his Hope and Fury Tour. Opening with an unaccompanied rendition of his 1978 h...
